name: tippy.js

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written implementation when you need annotations, term definitions, or rich popovers anchored to any element and automatically kept away from viewport edges, because native absolute-positioned bubbles fail at collision flipping, scroll containers, and keyboard-focus accessibility.
en.why_valuable: AI can only write an absolutely positioned bubble shown on hover by default; it cannot provide Popper-grade flip/shift, repositioning on scroll, and consistent touch/keyboard-focus state. tippy.js reduces these high-failure areas to an anchor plus shallow configuration.

data_in.note: anchor_selector must match one HTMLElement within the current carrier root; content is treated as plain text by default. Set allow_html to true only for trusted HTML.

schema.anchor_selector: string -- CSS selector for the unique anchor
schema.trigger?: string -- native tippy trigger-word combination, default 'mouseenter focus'
schema.interactive?: boolean -- whether content is interactive, default false
schema.allow_html?: boolean -- whether to treat content as HTML, default false

when_to_use: 需要让批注、术语解释或富内容 popover 锚定任意元素并自动避开视口边缘时用它而非手写,因为原生 absolute 气泡在碰撞翻转、滚动容器和焦点可达上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写 hover 时显示的绝对定位气泡,做不到 Popper 级 flip/shift、滚动重定位、触摸与键盘焦点的一致状态;tippy.js 把这些高失败区收敛为 anchor 加浅配置。

data_in.note: anchor_selector 在当前载体根内命中一个 HTMLElement;content 默认按纯文本处理,只有可信 HTML 才把 allow_html 设为 true。

schema.anchor_selector: string —— 唯一锚点的 CSS selector
schema.trigger?: string —— tippy 原生触发词组合,默认 'mouseenter focus'
schema.interactive?: boolean —— 内容是否可交互,默认 false
schema.allow_html?: boolean —— 是否把 content 当 HTML,默认 false

carriers.widget: supported:显式 appendTo 锚点父元素,避免默认落 document.body;核心 CSS 放 shadowRoot,Popper DOM 不越界
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN 会解析 @popperjs/core,另加载同版本核心 CSS

isolation.evidence: 默认 appendTo=document.body(widget boot 用 appendTo:()=>anchor.parentElement 覆盖);模块级 document mousemove/touchstart 全局监听不清理;ESM 不自动注 CSS,tippy.css 须手动进 shadow
